Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendants Person Most Knowledgeable And Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Jan-22-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. ROY ENAV, Esq. of Quill & Arrow, LLP (tel: 310-933-4271) for Plaintiff.
Atty. PAIGE SILVA, Esq. of Evans Fears Schutter McNulty Mickus (tel: 949-301-9464) for Defendants.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF JULIO PAZ GALLO's Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendants Person Most Knowledgeable And Production Of Documents.

Matter argued. Upon conclusion, the Court adopts its tentative ruling as modified:

Plaintiff's Motion be granted as follows: Defendant AMERICAN HONDA MOTOR CO., INC. is ordered to provide at least two availability dates for the deposition of its "Person Most Knowledgeable" to occur prior to May 31, 2025.
Defendant AMERICAN HONDA MOTOR CO., INC. is ordered to produce all responsive documents other than those claimed to be privileged no later than 14 calendar days before the agreed-upon date for the first deposition. All responsive documents withheld on the grounds of privilege must be included in a privilege log to be served at the time the responsive non-privileged documents are produced.

Order submitted.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/HEK)

Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendants Person Most Knowledgeable And Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Jan-14-2025 Continued To Jan-22-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF JULIO PAZ GALLO's Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendants Person Most Knowledgeable And Production Of Documents.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Continued to January 22, 2025, to be heard in Department 301's Discovery calendar. Parties are to provide courtesy copies of their filings immediately with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/HEK)
